programme.title: Catch Me If You Can
programme.desc: Today, the Junior Vets meet some feisty meerkats who need their claws trimmed, but first, they've got to catch them. Ashanti, the elephant, gets his feet and tail cleaned. Johnny and Inel discover what you get when you cross a lion and a tiger.

programme.title: The Flowering Desert
programme.desc: Four young adventurers discover how plants, animals and people survive in the harsh desert environment of Namaqua National Park in South Africa. The short rainy season has started and the desert is in full bloom.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Zombied
programme.desc: Motor creates a new computer game whose addictiveness threatens the productivity of the entire world.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: The Periodic Table
programme.desc: How does the Periodic Table work? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemistry. Have hands-on fun by decoding a secret message on a blank piece of paper, and get to know Dmitri Mendeleev, a chemist and inventor – the father of the Periodic Table.

programme.title: Micro Mycology
programme.desc: How to make ice cream without a freezer? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of organic chemistry. Have hands-on fun by making your own ice cream, and get to know Gloria Lim, who studied fungi, their use to humans, and their role in decomposition.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Trip to Netherlands
programme.desc: On which day in December should people receive their presents? Zoe and Milo are sure that it should be on Christmas, but Alim explains that in some countries, this happens on December 6th. They travel to the Netherlands and learn the story of St. Nicholas.

programme.title: Rings Around Saturn
programme.desc: Looking through the telescope, Jupiter spots Saturn and its rings. Can you walk on them? Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde turn into planets to find out.

programme.title: The Biggest Animals
programme.desc: Mr. Battery collects photos of the largest animals, but he's still missing a photo of the mysterious giant squid.

programme.title: Penguin Rescue
programme.desc: When an iceberg brings an emperor penguin and his egg into the Bay, Darwin and Newts help him get home.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... Ballet Shoes
programme.desc: Henry meets a pair of ballet shoes at a dance rehearsal class, and becomes a ballet dancer.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met.....a Sink
programme.desc: Henry goes into the bathroom to wash his hands and meets a Sink. Tap offers to wash Henry's hands but no water comes out of his spout!

programme.title: A Knight to Remember
programme.desc: Doki figures that to be a knight, all you had to do was joust. Gabi thinks there was more to it than that – but what did you have to do to become a knight? To find out, they head to a medieval festival in England and discover the true meaning of ‘chivalry'.

programme.title: Florian Kohler: Pool Trick Shot Extraordinaire
programme.desc: GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder Florian Kohler, also known as 'Venom', demonstrates his precise pool trick-shot skills, sharing the key to his success and what it takes to be a renowned trick-shot performer.

programme.title: Space Access
programme.desc: Space exploration helps extend the reach of the human race to beyond our planet. But is everyone welcome on that journey? Host Emily Calandrelli explores the ways different people, companies and organizations are helping make spaceflight more accessible.

programme.title: The Colour of Heat
programme.desc: Eric learns that wearing light colours in the sun keeps you cooler than dark colours. He does an ice cube experiment to how lighter colours reflect light and heat, just like a mirror.

programme.title: From Travel Sickness to a Good Night's Sleep
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand explain what happens when you feel travel sick and investigate the importance of sleep. In the emergency room, there are tummy troubles and an injured hand.

programme.title: A Feisty Badger
programme.desc: Today Matilda, the horse, has surgery, and a cute but feisty badger needs help after being hit by a car. The Junior Vets release Timbuktu, the hedgehog, back into the wild, and Johnny and Inel find out how fish sleep and meet a dog with a passion for pop music.

programme.title: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Eric uses a hula hoop to explore nature and create a special research area teeming with life. Using the hoop helps him identify, count and keep track of the tiny creatures and plants he finds.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Linlang
programme.desc: Victor Lualhati, a former boxer turned seaman, discovers signs of his wife Juliana's infidelity and begins a personal investigation. As he digs deeper, Victor uncovers a web of deception involving powerful figures and family secrets, realizing that the affair is only part of a much larger and more dangerous conspiracy.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: E32 - Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout 'DING DONG' when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: E17 - I'm Not Even Scared Of Nothing
programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.title: E42 - Show And Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: E48 - The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: E13 - Master Of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E3 - Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E21 - The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E10 - Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song 'All My Friends' to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: E90 - Noise
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po are trying very hard not to make any noise. Then they make as much noise as possible during the Tubby Phone Dance.

programme.title: E4 - Cheesy Bang Bang
programme.desc: The cheese delivery race is on as Mojo and the racer top try to deliver food faster than Filo. But the competition gets too hot when an explosive souffle is on the table!

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E14 - The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: E7 - Song Of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: E8 - Squirrel Babies
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E14 - Perfect
programme.desc: For her Father's Day card, Bluey sets out to draw a picture of herself and her father together. While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E4 - Andy And The Baby Humpback Whale
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

While recalling her favourite memories of playing with Bandit, Bluey struggles with the idea that her drawing must be perfect. Chilli tries to convince Bluey that perfection isn't easy, or absolutely necessary.

programme.title: E4 - Andy And The Baby Humpback Whale
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Pacific ocean, off the tropical islands of Hawaii, on a baby animal mission to see how a baby humpback whale prepares for its 5000 km migration North to the rich feeding grounds of Alaska.

programme.title: E22 - The Shadow Badge
programme.desc: There has been a power cut and the squirrels use their torches to make shadows.

programme.title: E21 - The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: E20 - The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: E17 - Paisley Sea
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: E34 - Buttons
programme.desc: Little Woo would like Stanley to help them find more noisy things in the museum. They go through the museum and pick out some things for a new exhibition.

programme.title: E33 - Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: E1 - It's Time To Post A Picture
programme.desc: JoJo has drawn a picture to show Great Gran Gran over a video call, but just as she's about to show it, the internet goes down!

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E48 - The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: E1 - Cool, Man
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: E11 - Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song 'We're Chilli When It's Hot'

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: Pistes Vertes:2025-2026
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: La Volante
programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: Ma Gueule
programme.desc: 2016, during the European Cup. Stephane returns to La Louviere, his home town, to watch a match with his childhood friends, Luca and Cesare. When Italy wins, they head off to celebrate the victory in a Flemish night club. But there's a problem: Stephane is refused entry.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E3 - Jungle River
programme.desc: Cheer as young gladiators earn their stripes in the dense tropical forests of the Americas. Stand back as a poison dart frog launches a toxic barrage, observe a jaguar-caiman turf war, and see a hungry coati cross paths with a defensive tarantula.

programme.title: E3 - Clash of the Alphas
programme.desc: Stand back when a brawl erupts after the Street Troop finds the Hill Troop on their turf. Assess Matnoor’s poor parenting skills, see alpha wannabe Ajit make his move, then cool off as a heat wave pushes everyone to share the wealth in the forest.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps
programme.desc: Explore community-run Reteti Elephant Sanctuary, where human surrogate moms offer survival lessons and nurture young elephants through play. Bond with trunkless Long’uro and see why six-year-old Kelele’s mysterious illness could delay his release.

programme.title: E1 - First Steps

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E4 - Tidelands
programme.desc: Head to America’s far north for a peek at the ultimate fighters that live along its waterways. See a spring thaw kick off the competition, pitting eagles against herons, bears against bears, and dragonfly nymphs against venomous giant water bugs.

programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E3 - Powering Up Earth Week
programme.desc: Gecko is powering up for Earth Week! He builds a wind turbine to provide clean energy for Kat’s Base. Then, he converts Bobby the Bus & Dylan the Dump Truck to electric engines to make them cleaner! The eco-friendly work continues as Gecko cleans up a polluted river, teaches Weasel how to sort waste & helps Mama Recycle win a recycling race!

programme.title: E4 - Answering Big Questions!
programme.desc: Blippi is answering some of life's biggest questions! He shrinks down for a night adventure in a mouth to learn the right way to brush teeth from Bill Brushy. Then, he flies up a nose to find out what makes us sneeze! His curiosity continues as he learns how a fly can walk upside down on the ceiling, discovers the artistic process of how spiders make their webs & even becomes a contestant on a game show to learn the difference between fruits & vegetables!

programme.title: E1 - JJ's Yummy Food & Clean-Up Fun!
programme.desc: It's a day of yummy food & clean-up fun with JJ! First, learn about all types of pasta & make some from scratch in Grandma's kitchen. Then, Cody's Dad shows how fun & tasty healthy eating can be with delicious sliced fruit. After all the fun, it's time to clean up! JJ's family gives Bingo a scrub in the tub after he gets dirty playing outside, & all the kids chip in to wash a filthy firetruck. It's fun to make a mess, & even more fun to clean up!

programme.title: E3 - Powering Up Earth Week
programme.desc: Gecko is powering up for Earth Week! He builds a wind turbine to provide clean energy for Kat’s Base. Then, he converts Bobby the Bus & Dylan the Dump Truck to electric engines to make them cleaner! The eco-friendly work continues as Gecko cleans up a polluted river, teaches Weasel how to sort waste & helps Mama Recycle win a recycling race!

programme.title: E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.desc: In this episode, we set out to right those wrongs with big boost and even bigger aero.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Oikawa Shimon, a chef who has lost everything, drifts into Tsukihate, an imaginary town where those on the brink of life mysteriously gather. There he finds Magdala-ya, a tiny diner on a cliff run by Ria Arima-a mysterious woman with a scar on the neck. Through Ria's cooking and her unconditional kindness, Shimon begins to reclaim the courage to live. Based on Harada Maha's novel, this moving drama explores sin, redemption, and the irreplaceable value of life.

programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich with culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you the stories that matter to the Pacific and the most up-to-date information, from journalists with deep regional expertise.

programme.title: E10 - Autumn: Grow Cacti, Lychees & Organic Veg
programme.desc: Costa explores a vibrant autumn garden, Guest Presenter Thanh gets stuck into lychees, Sophie has natives for formal styles, Jerry finds a huge cacti collection, and we meet radio presenter and veggie gardener Phil Dudman.

programme.title: E10 - Autumn: Grow Cacti, Lychees & Organic Veg
programme.desc: Costa explores a vibrant autumn garden, Guest Presenter Thanh gets stuck into lychees, Sophie has natives for formal styles, Jerry finds a huge cacti collection, and we meet radio presenter and veggie gardener Phil Dudman.

programme.title: E11 - The Greatest
programme.desc: Top Chef can't go to Kentucky without taking a turn at fried chicken. Chef Art Smith guests judges a secret herbs and spices blind taste test ahead of the Quickfire fry-off. After the finger licking goodness, the Chefs turn their attention to another Kentucky legend, the Louisville Lip, boxer and philanthropist Muhammad Ali. Using his memorable fights as inspiration, the Chefs must make a progressive meal for a charity benefit at the Muhammad Ali Center for donors, the judges, and special guest Laila Ali.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow's trading day.

programme.title: U.s. Markets Edition
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC's programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: The China Connection
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China's economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime

programme.title: The Hub With Wang Guan
programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. It aims to connect people, cultures and societies across the East and the West. The program features dynamic designs, fast pace and rich visuals to keep viewers engaged. programme.desc: The Hub with Wang Guan covers hot-button geopolitical and economic issues, as well as interesting stories and trends in culture, education, technology and lifestyle. programme.title: E4 - Ben Stiller

programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it!

programme.title: E201 - Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.desc: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: Savdhaan India -Naya Adhyay
programme.desc: The host provides an in-depth analysis of some of the most shocking real-life crime stories in India and sheds light on how the victims fought back for justice.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: Inner Senses
programme.desc: Yan always sees dead people. Jim, her psychologist, thinks it's all in her mind brought by loneliness and by unpleasant experiences of past relationships. He devotes all his time to curing her. Jim soon falls in love as Yan is freed of her vision. But then he starts seeing dead people too. Jim remembers his past. His girlfriend in high school, named Yu, committed suicide when Jim tried to break up with her in twenty years ago. Now, with Yan's help and love, can Jim face up to the ghost and end the nightmare?

programme.title: The Sword
programme.desc: Swords, like diamonds, sometimes carry a curse. And the famous sword Chi Mud is such a sword. When swordmaster Wah acquires Chi Mud, he is advised to destroy it or he will be killed by this very sword. Wah does not listen. He has already retired into seclusion and does not think the young swordsmen can find and challenge him. Li is such a young swordsman. He even has dueled and killed another young challenger. Li by accident saves a young girl from a professional killer. In a few days, the girl and Li become friends. But the girl leaves in anger when Li meets his old flame Hsiao Yue, now married to Lin Wan. Li is ambushed by killer Chan...

programme.title: She Shoots Straight
programme.desc: One by one, the Huangs died in the course of safeguarding law and order in Hong Kong. First, the father and then the two elder sons gave their lives in action. That leaves Tsung-pao, the youngest son, and four daughters. They are all police officers. What makes the mother prouder is Tsung-pao's marrying a senior policewoman Mina. Old Mrs. Huang is hoping to see a grandson to carry on the lawmen family tree. But the sisters don't like Mina. They make sure she does not have a good time. Mina suffers in silence. A raid on a Vietnamese gang was ordered. Tsung-pao and Mina to command. But sister Ling commits a serious mistake and the whole operation fails. Ling is suspended. She blames it on Mina...

programme.title: Remember What I Forgot
programme.desc: Anyone who has anything to do with the film industry in Hong Kong, must have heard of a film buff called Lil' Kim. He knows everything there is to know about filmmaking. Whether it's on the set, at the movie premiere or at a press conference, he always shows up uninvited. Nobody knows where he came from and why he showed up... Ginger Keung is the producer of a reality show who suspects Lil' Kim is in fact a film critic who pans movies to extort advertising dollars from film companies. She zeroes in on Lil' Kim as her next target and decides to dig into his elusive past...
